titleStmt.title: SII 22.227: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao

No. 227. (A.R. No. 227 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, GINGEE TALUK, EYIL. RUINED ŚIVA TEMPLE ON HILL—ON THREE LOOSE STONES LYING NEAR THE CENTRAL SHRINE. JOMMAṆA-UḌAIYAR, SON OF KUMĀRA KAMPAṆA UḌAIYAR (KAMPA II)— SAUMYA (= Śaka 1291—A.D. 1369-70)

summary.p: This records the assignment of one Aḻagapperumāḷ alias Śoṭṭaikkōṉ for the maintenance of a perpetual lamp in the temple of Tirumāḍaippēṟuḍaiya-Nāyaṉār at Eyyil. This is signed at the end, among others, by Duvārapativēḷāṉ, probably the same person mentioned in No. 223 above.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīman mahāmaṇḍaliśvara
Arirāyavipāṭa pāṣaikku
ttappuvarāyar kaṇṭaṉ śrī

yar kumāra kampaṇa Uṭaiyar
kumāracommaṇa Uṭaiyaṟku
c cellāniṉṟa saumya varuṣam
Āṭimāta mutalukku Eyyil
Uṭaiyār tirumāṭaippeṟuṭaiya
nāyiṉāṟku tiruṉuntāviḷakku

kuṭiyāka Aḻakapperumāḷ Āṉa
coṭṭaikkoṉai cantiṟātitta
varaikkum viṭṭom Ivai
tuvārapati veḷār Eḻuttu Ivai
perumāṅkoṉ Eḻuttu Ivai nila
kkoṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kaḷappāḷar Eḻu
ttu Ivai veṭṭaikkoṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 22.227 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
